note: iec-talk-turnaround [opus]: drive must latch addressed-to-TALK across ATN-release + enter talk-send (pull CLK). C64 spins ACPTR $EE67; drive sits at $EBFF/$EC00 idle. Fix the drive DOS attention/turnaround so it engages as talker -> directory bytes flow to $0801.
followups: custom-loader-gate [opus] — ACID TEST: scramble_infinity.d64 ($DD00 bitbang + VIC raster sync, the user-flagged hardest case). Standard LOAD lands the bootstrap, then the loaded code installs the custom $DD00 loader for the bulk. Trace-diff vs TS catches 1-cycle desync.
